nodes.label: Tests for the Kanban dashboard plugin backend (plugins/kanban/dashboard/plugin_a
Dynamically load plugins/kanban/dashboard/plugin_api.py and return its router.
Isolated MANGABA_HOME with an empty kanban DB.
Scheduled/time-delay tasks must not be silently bucketed into todo.
Dashboard ``?board=default`` must win even if the CLI's current-board     pointe
Tenant/assignee filters must work with the dashboard SDK Select API.      The da
The rendered board must also filter by tenant.      The API request includes ``?
Fresh browsers should open the backend current board, not default.      Explicit
Direct status write: the drag-drop path for statuses without a     dedicated ver
Reopening a completed parent must invalidate ready children immediately.      Th
Dashboard PATCH cannot transition a task directly to 'running'.      The only le
Triage tasks must stay in triage even when they have no parents.
A user (or specifier) can push a task back into triage, and out of it.
If kanban.db doesn't exist yet, GET /board must create it, not 500.
When _SESSION_TOKEN is set (normal dashboard context), a missing or     wrong ?t
The event stream must honor ``board=default`` even when the global     current-b
``asyncio.CancelledError`` while sleeping in the poll loop is the     normal uvi
Bulk updates must match single-task PATCH: direct 'running' is invalid.
Regression for #26744: failed status transitions must be surfaced     inline, no
Regression for the dependency selects in the task drawer: the     add-parent / a
One bad id in the middle of a batch must not prevent others from     applying.
GET /tasks/:id carries a runs[] array with the attempt history.
A task that's never been claimed has an empty runs[] list, not     a missing key
PATCH /tasks/:id with status=done + summary + metadata must     reach complete_t
Back-compat: PATCH without the new fields still completes.
PATCH to archived while running must close the in-flight run.
GET /tasks/:id returns events with run_id populated.
_task_dict serializes Task.skills=None as [] so the drawer can     always .lengt
POST /tasks fails fast when callers confuse toolsets with skills.
ready+assigned task + no gateway -> response has `warning` field     so the dash
Dispatcher running -> no `warning` field in the response.
Triage tasks never get the warning (they can't be dispatched     anyway until pr
If task_age raises for any reason, GET /board must NOT 500.      Pre-fix behavio
GET /tasks/:id also calls _task_dict — same fallback should kick in.      This i
Probe failure must never break task creation.
Simulate a user with home channels set on telegram and discord.
GET /home-channels returns entries only for platforms where the     user has set
Without task_id, every entry's subscribed=false (UI "no task" state).
POST .../home-subscribe/telegram writes a kanban_notify_subs row     keyed to th
After subscribe, the GET endpoint reports subscribed=true for that     platform
Re-subscribing keeps a single row at the DB layer.
Re-subscribing should backfill notifier ownership on ownerless rows.
Platforms without a home configured (slack in the fixture) return 404.
Subscribing on telegram does not affect discord and vice versa.
Zero platforms with a home -> empty list (UI hides the section).
Tasks with a pending completion_blocked_hallucination event surface     a ``warn
A completed or edited event after a hallucination event clears     the warning b
POST /tasks/<id>/reclaim drops the claim, returns ok, and emits     a manual rec
Reclaiming a task that's already ready returns 409.
Reassigning a running task without reclaim_first returns 409.
With reclaim_first=true, a running task is reclaimed+reassigned in     one call.
Severity filter is at-or-above: warning includes warning+error+critical,     err
/board should attach both the full diagnostics list AND the     compact warnings
Helper: install a fake auxiliary client so the specifier endpoint     can run wi
The endpoint intentionally returns ``{ok: false, reason: ...}`` for     "task no
GET /board?board=default must not fall through to env/current-file resolution.
Dashboard REST calls must include board=default instead of relying on server cur
Client-side search must match body, result, latest_summary, and summary     so f
Bulk action bar must expose reclaim_first checkbox and expanded status buttons.
Shift-click must trigger range selection via toggleRange.
Dragging a selected card with other selections must use /tasks/bulk.
Partial bulk failures must highlight failing cards.
